narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Ossington Strip — between Dundas and Queen

The original Pizzeria Libretto storefront, now reborn as its nightlife incarnation.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Ossington Strip — between Dundas and Queen

The original Pizzeria Libretto storefront, now reborn as its nightlife incarnation.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Low lighting, buzzing room, the wood-fired oven still glowing in the corner.

blocks.title: Drinks
blocks.body:
𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

Cocktails hit strong. Amaro in heavy rotation.

🍸 Signatures:
• Negroni — gin, vermouth blend, campari
• Aperol Spritz — prosecco, soda
• Espresso Martini — vodka, espresso, kahlua
• La Vampa — bourbon, montenegro, maple cayenne

🍷 Wine Night: 50% off bottles (Mondays)

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

𝗡𝗲𝗮𝗽𝗼𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗻 𝗣𝗶𝘇𝘇𝗮 $19-23
• Margherita — $19 ⭐
• Pepperoni (cup & char) — $21 ⭐
• 'Nduja — $22, spicy calabrian, stracciatella
• Duck Confit — $23, panna, roasted pear
• Housemade Sausage — $21, caramelized onion
• Funghi — $21, gorgonzola crema, mushroom

𝗡𝗬 𝗦𝘁𝘆𝗹𝗲 $27-34
• Hot Soppressata — $32, hot maple ⭐
• Hawaiian — $34, bacon, jalapeño, hot maple

𝗦𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀 $5-19
• Arancini — $15
• Meatballs — $16, house sugo, focaccia
• Buttermilk Fried Calamari — $19
• Rapini — $9

𝗗𝗼𝗹𝗰𝗶
• Tiramisu — $12 ⭐
• Gelato — $4/6

Note: Same Libretto DNA — 72-hour fermented sourdough crust, 850° wood fire. GF crust +$5.

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$

Dinner for 2: $80-110 (with drinks)

Reservations: OpenTable, walk-ins welcome

📞 (416) 532-8000
🌐 pizzerialibretto.com/bar-libretto

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Wed–Sat: 4pm – 1am
Mon–Tue, Sun: Closed

𝗛𝗔𝗣𝗣𝗬 𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
• 4–6pm: $3 arancini, $4 meatball, $6 beer, $7 wine, $8 Aperol spritz
• 9pm: Second happy hour kicks in

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Early evening (4–6pm): Hit happy hour, quieter vibe
• Late night (10pm+): This is when it hums — post-dinner crowd, third bottle of wine energy
• Avoid: Early weekend dinner if you want a seat at the bar

blocks.title: Travel Intel
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗟 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗟

From: Yonge St & St Clair Ave W, Toronto, ON M4T 1Y7, Canada
To: 221 Ossington Ave, Toronto, ON M6J 2Z8

• walking: 1 hour 28 mins • 6.5 km
• transit: 39 mins • 7.2 km
• driving: 21 mins • 6.9 km (traffic: 15 mins)
• bicycling: 23 mins • 6.9 km

Best modality: DRIVING ⭐
Why: Fastest available option (21 mins)

travel.origin: Yonge St & St Clair Ave W, Toronto, ON M4T 1Y7, Canada
